message:
test(core): cover same-connection stale-plan regression (#72)

Adds two tests to cache_staleness_cross_txn_regression.rs:

- prepared_select_sees_update_from_same_connection_after_cache_warmup:
  exercises the canonical same-connection write-then-read pattern
  (INSERT → read (warms plan cache) → UPDATE → re-read). Prior to
  the commit-time clear_compilation_reuse_caches invocation this
  returned the pre-UPDATE value or zero rows because the cached
  plan was bound to pre-commit B-tree state.

- cte_wrapped_select_sees_update_from_same_connection_after_cache_warmup:
  the CTE-wrapped variant beads_rust uses in its re-read paths.
  Before the fix the CTE shape and the bare fast-path shape each
  had their own staleness windows, so wrapping in a CTE shifted
  the bug rather than eliminating it.

Both tests pass with the commit-time cache invalidation and the
now-public clear_compilation_reuse_caches surface introduced in
4ea55010.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
